repos.name: iptv-org/iptv
repos.desc: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

repos.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
repos.desc: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

repos.name: chatwoot/chatwoot
repos.desc: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬

repos.name: obra/superpowers
repos.desc: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

repos.name: apple/container
repos.desc: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

repos.name: music-assistant/server
repos.desc: Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.

repos.name: kenn-io/agentsview
repos.desc: Local-first session intelligence and analytics for coding agents, supporting Claude Code, Codex, and more than 20 other agents. Also: 100x faster replacement for ccusage!

repos.name: LMCache/LMCache
repos.desc: LMCache: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer

repos.name: microsoft/PowerToys
repos.desc: Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

repos.name: andrewyng/aisuite
repos.desc: Simple, unified interface to multiple Generative AI providers

repos.name: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
repos.desc: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

repos.name: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
repos.desc: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models

blog_md:
# 🚀 今日 GitHub 热搜：iptv 霸榜，开发者集体失眠

> 📅 2026-06-14  |  🔍 共收录 14 个热门项目

众所周知，GitHub Trending 是程序员界的「今日头条」。今日头条播报开始 📢

---

## 📊 今日统计

主力语言：**Python**: 4 | **Shell**: 2 | **TypeScript**: 1 | **Ruby**: 1 | **Swift**: 1
